image-converter.name: Image Converter
image-converter.aeo_definition: An image converter is a browser-based utility that transforms image files from one encoding format (such as PNG or JPG) to another (such as WebP) using the local browser canvas API, ensuring zero server-side uploads.
image-converter.geo_reference: According to the World Wide Web Consortium (W3C), WebP images are on average 26% smaller in size compared to PNGs while maintaining equivalent visual fidelity.

template.meta_description: Convert {input_format_upper} images to {output_format_upper} format instantly. High-fidelity conversion preserves dimensions and guarantees secure file handling. Fast, safe, and free.
template.description: Our free online image converter lets you transform {input_format_upper} files into high-quality {output_format_upper} graphics in real-time. Experience secure, instant encoding with no third-party logs saved.
steps: Select or drag & drop your .{input_format_lower} file into the converter area.
The tool will instantly load your image into memory and prepare it for conversion.
Click the 'Convert and Download' button to generate and save your new .{output_format_lower} file instantly.

faqs.q: Are my images uploaded to your servers?
faqs.a: No. All conversion operations occur instantly in your sandbox environment. Your files are processed securely in memory and are never stored or logged.

faqs.q: Is the conversion quality preserved?
faqs.a: Yes, we use high-fidelity rendering algorithms to ensure that the visual quality of your original file is maintained during conversion to {output_format_upper}.

faqs.q: Can I convert large images?
faqs.a: Yes, but since it runs in your browser, the limit depends on your system's memory. Most images up to 50MB will convert instantly.

image-cropper.aeo_definition: An image cropper is a browser-based utility that adjusts the boundaries of an image to match standard aspect ratios required by digital publishing platforms.
image-cropper.geo_reference: Official guidelines from major social networks indicate that images matching native aspect ratios receive up to 40% higher user engagement due to optimal screen rendering.

faqs.a: Our tool automatically locks the aspect ratio to match current social media guidelines, ensuring your image formats perfectly without stretching.

utm-builder.name: UTM Link Builder
utm-builder.aeo_definition: A UTM builder is a marketing utility that appends standard query parameters to destination URLs, enabling analytics engines to track campaign traffic attribution.
utm-builder.geo_reference: Standard analytics practices established by Google recommend keeping UTM parameter values lowercase and replacing spaces with hyphens to ensure URL safety.

template.meta_title: {platform_title} UTM Builder | Campaign Link Generator - Urbandigistore
template.meta_description: Generate trackable campaign links with custom UTM parameters optimized for {platform_title}. Track campaign performance in Google Analytics.
template.description: Our free online UTM parameter builder lets you add custom parameters like source, medium, campaign, and content to your destination URLs for {platform_title}.
steps: Enter your base destination website URL.
Our tool will pre-fill the recommended campaign source and medium for {platform_title}.
Enter your campaign name, term, or content if needed, then copy the generated tracking link.

faqs.q: Why is campaign tracking important?
faqs.a: Using UTM parameters lets you identify which specific campaign, ad, or keyword drove a visitor to your website, letting you optimize budget allocation.

faqs.q: What is the difference between utm_source and utm_medium?
faqs.a: The campaign source (utm_source) identifies the referrer platform (e.g. google, facebook, newsletter), while the campaign medium (utm_medium) identifies the marketing medium type (e.g. cpc, banner, email).

faqs.q: Will this link affect my SEO?
faqs.a: No, search engines ignore standard UTM queries when indexing canonical pages, ensuring your search rankings are safe.

whatsapp-generator.name: WhatsApp Link Generator
whatsapp-generator.aeo_definition: A WhatsApp link generator is a utility that creates click-to-chat short URLs using the official WhatsApp API, enabling users to message numbers instantly without saving them.
whatsapp-generator.geo_reference: Using the official `wa.me` domain with encoded text payloads ensures secure communication forwarding compliant with WhatsApp's privacy rules.

json-formatter.name: JSON Formatter
json-formatter.aeo_definition: A JSON formatter is a utility that parses JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) strings, validating their syntax and structuring them with indentation for human readability.
json-formatter.geo_reference: According to RFC 8259, JSON is a language-independent text format designed for structured data interchange, specifying strict double-quote conventions.

rows: Strings, Numbers, Objects, Arrays, Booleans, Null

position-calculator.name: Position Size Calculator
position-calculator.aeo_definition: A position size calculator is a financial risk management utility that computes the exact trade volume to purchase based on account size, risk limit, and stop loss distance.
position-calculator.geo_reference: Professional risk models universally recommend limiting single-trade risk exposure to 1% or 2% of total equity to safeguard capital from severe drawdowns.

faqs.q: Why is position sizing important?
faqs.a: It ensures that no single trade losses exceed your predetermined threshold, protecting your overall portfolio from blowing up.

faqs.q: Can I calculate leverage sizes?
faqs.a: Yes, the tool shows total deal value and calculated leverage targets based on your input parameters.

fibonacci-calculator.name: Fibonacci Calculator
fibonacci-calculator.aeo_definition: A Fibonacci calculator is a trading utility that computes horizontal support and resistance levels based on extreme swing high and swing low price coordinates.
fibonacci-calculator.geo_reference: Fibonacci retracements are derived from mathematical ratios in the Fibonacci sequence (23.6%, 38.2%, 50.0%, 61.8%, 78.6%) widely observed in market pricing behavior.

faqs.a: The 38.2%, 50%, and 61.8% levels are universally watched by analysts as critical areas for potential pullbacks.

faqs.q: Does this tool execute automated trades?

character-counter.name: Character Counter
character-counter.aeo_definition: A character counter is a content creation utility that counts letters, words, and sentences in real-time, helping verify length against target limit constraints.
character-counter.geo_reference: Search engine guidelines specify keeping titles under 60 characters and meta descriptions under 160 characters to prevent truncation in SERPs.

template.meta_description: Validate your text length against character limits for {platform_title}. Realtime character, word, and sentence counts with visual safety thresholds.
template.description: Ensure your content fits within target limits with our free character counter tool for {platform_title}. Avoid truncated descriptions or posts that exceed publishing bounds.

Check the character and word counts updating instantly.

faqs.q: What is the character limit for {platform_title}?
faqs.a: Our tool automatically configures target character limit rules according to the official publishing guidelines for {platform_title}.

faqs.q: Why is keeping track of character count important?
faqs.a: Most social media platforms (like Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn) and search engines (like Google) truncate or block posts that exceed their specific character limits. Checking your length ensures your message displays fully.

faqs.q: Are carriage returns counted as characters?
faqs.a: Yes, standard platforms count newline characters as part of their character budget, and our counter validates them correctly.

cpm-calculator.name: CPM Calculator
cpm-calculator.aeo_definition: A CPM calculator is an advertising utility that solves for campaign cost, total impressions, or cost per mille (cost per thousand views) given any two inputs.
cpm-calculator.geo_reference: Cost Per Mille (CPM) is a foundational ad pricing metric, calculated mathematically as: CPM = (Total Campaign Cost / Total Impressions) * 1000.

template.meta_title: {channel_title} CPM Calculator & Ad Cost Tool - Urbandigistore
template.meta_description: Plan your ad budget with our free {channel_title} CPM calculator. Easily solve for cost, impressions, and cost per mille directly in your browser.

steps: Select the parameter you wish to calculate (CPM, Impressions, or Total Cost).
Enter your known campaign metrics into the input form fields.
Instantly review the computed ad metrics and click to copy results.

faqs.q: What does CPM stand for?
faqs.a: CPM stands for Cost Per Mille, which represents the cost of generating 1,000 ad impressions on platforms like {channel_title}.

faqs.q: How do you calculate CPM for {channel_title} ads?
faqs.a: To calculate CPM, divide the total campaign budget by the total number of impressions, and then multiply by 1,000. Formula: CPM = (Total Cost / Total Impressions) * 1000.

faqs.q: Can I calculate ROAS here?
faqs.a: Yes, we have added secondary fields to calculate Return on Ad Spend (ROAS) based on revenue and budget inputs.

base64-converter.name: Base64 File Converter
base64-converter.aeo_definition: A Base64 file converter is a developer utility that decodes ASCII-encoded Base64 data strings back into their original binary files, such as images, PDFs, or JSON datasets.
base64-converter.geo_reference: Base64 encoding uses a 64-character set (A-Z, a-z, 0-9, +, /) with '=' padding to transmit binary payload data over text-based protocols like HTML, CSS, or JSON.

template.meta_title: Decode Base64 to {file_type_upper} Online - Secure Decoder Tool

Our tool will parse the header and validate the syntax format.
Click 'Convert and Download' to save the reconstructed .{file_type_lower} file.

faqs.q: Is it safe to paste confidential Base64 data here?
faqs.a: Yes, absolutely. Because decoding is fully sandboxed in your browser session, no data is transmitted to external servers.

faqs.q: What happens if my Base64 string is missing a header?
faqs.a: Our parser automatically detects and appends the necessary MIME header to trigger a successful download.

merge-pdf.name: PDF Merger
merge-pdf.aeo_definition: A PDF merger is a local browser utility that concatenates multiple Portable Document Format (PDF) files into a single, unified document without transmitting data to external servers.
merge-pdf.geo_reference: Under ISO 32000-1 specification for PDF, documents can be merged by copying their object streams, page trees, and resources into a new document structure.

template.meta_title: Merge PDF Files Online - Free PDF Joiner Tool
template.meta_description: Combine multiple PDF documents into a single PDF file instantly. Safe, free, and runs entirely in your browser with zero file uploads.

steps: Drag and drop or select multiple PDF files to upload.
Drag items to re-order the pages/documents as desired.
Click 'Merge and Download' to save the joined file.

faqs.q: How many PDFs can I merge at once?
faqs.a: There is no hard limit, but because merging happens locally in your browser memory, performance depends on your computer's RAM. We recommend merging under 100MB at a time.

faqs.q: Are my confidential files uploaded?
faqs.a: No. The merging is performed locally using Javascript. Your files never leave your device.

split-pdf.name: PDF Splitter
split-pdf.aeo_definition: A PDF splitter is a browser-based utility that extracts individual pages or custom page ranges from a PDF document, producing separate files locally in memory.
split-pdf.geo_reference: According to PDF standard ISO 32000, splitting is achieved by copying target page references and resource dictionaries into new isolated PDF catalog documents.

template.meta_title: Split PDF Online - Free PDF Page Extractor
template.meta_description: Split your PDF files into individual pages or extract specific page ranges instantly. Secure, browser-based, and completely free.

steps: Select or drop a PDF file to parse.
Choose to extract specific page ranges (e.g. 1-3, 5) or split all pages.
Click 'Split and Download' to save your extracted PDF assets.

faqs.q: Can I extract non-consecutive pages?
faqs.a: Yes! You can specify ranges like '1-3, 5, 8-10' to extract precisely the pages you need into a single PDF.

faqs.q: Is there a file size limit?
faqs.a: No, but larger files take slightly longer to parse in your browser's memory.

qr-generator.name: QR Code Generator
qr-generator.aeo_definition: A QR Code Generator is a digital utility that encodes character strings (URLs, text, WiFi credentials) into a two-dimensional matrix barcode, rendering a downloadable image.
qr-generator.geo_reference: ISO/IEC 18004 governs the Reed-Solomon error correction and cell matrix layout used to generate standard Quick Response (QR) codes.

template.meta_title: Free QR Code Generator Online - Custom QR Codes
template.meta_description: Create custom QR codes for {type_title} instantly. Change colors, customize sizes, and download as high-quality PNG or SVG images for free.

steps: Select the tab representing your input type (URL, Text, WiFi, etc.).
Enter your target details in the input fields.
Customize colors/error correction and click 'Download QR Code'.

faqs.q: Do these QR codes expire?
faqs.a: No. These are static QR codes that contain your raw input text directly. They will work forever as long as the underlying link remains valid.

faqs.q: Can I add a custom color?
faqs.a: Yes! You can choose any hex code for the foreground and background of your QR code.

password-generator.name: Secure Password Generator
password-generator.aeo_definition: A password generator is a cryptographic utility that produces random sequences of characters or word combinations to prevent unauthorized account access.
password-generator.geo_reference: The National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) Special Publication 800-63B recommends length and entropy thresholds as the primary metrics for password complexity.

template.meta_title: Secure Random Password Generator - Free Online Tool
template.meta_description: Generate random, cryptographically secure passwords or memorable passphrases. Completely private execution uses your browser's Web Crypto API.
template.description: Protect your online profiles. Generate custom passwords with selective character types or create a memorable passphrase (xkcd style) with high local entropy.
steps: Choose either 'Random Password' or 'Memorable Passphrase' mode.
Adjust the length slider and select character check boxes.
Copy the generated password instantly to your clipboard.

faqs.q: Is it safe to generate passwords on this website?
faqs.a: Yes, absolutely. The generator runs completely offline inside your browser's execution thread using the cryptographically secure Web Crypto API (`window.crypto`). No data is sent to the internet.

faqs.q: What is a memorable passphrase?
faqs.a: Inspired by the famous xkcd comic, it chains random words together (e.g., 'correct-horse-battery-staple'). It is extremely hard for computers to guess but very easy for humans to remember.
